2603.16351.title: Automated identification of Ichneumonoidea wasps via YOLO-based deep learning: Integrating HiresCam for Explainable AI
2603.16351.paper_summary: Accurate taxonomic identification of parasitoid wasps within the superfamily Ichneumonoidea is essential for biodiversity assessment, ecological monitoring, and biological control programs. However, morphological similarity, small body size, and fine-grained interspecific variation make manual identification labor-intensive and expertise-dependent. This study proposes a deep learning-based framework for the automated identification of Ichneumonoidea wasps using a YOLO-based architecture integrated with High-Resolution Class Activation Mapping (HiResCAM) to enhance interpretability. The proposed system simultaneously identifies wasp families from high-resolution images. The dataset comprises 3556 high-resolution images of Hymenoptera specimens. The taxonomic distribution is primarily concentrated among the families Ichneumonidae (n = 786), Braconidae (n = 648), Apidae (n = 466), and Vespidae (n = 460). Extensive experiments were conducted using a curated dataset, with model performance evaluated through precision, recall, F1 score, and accuracy. The results demonstrate high accuracy of over 96 % and robust generalization across morphological variations. HiResCAM visualizations confirm that the model focuses on taxonomically relevant anatomical regions, such as wing venation, antennae segmentation, and metasomal structures, thereby validating the biological plausibility of the learned features. The integration of explainable AI techniques improves transparency and trustworthiness, making the system suitable for entomological research to accelerate biodiversity characterization in an under-described parasitoid superfamily.
2603.16351.paper_summary_zh: 準確的寄生蜂分類學鑑定在超科Ichneumonoidea中對於生物多樣性評估、生態監測和生物控制計劃至關重要。<lb/>然而，形態上的相似性、小體型和細微的種間變異使得手動鑑定需要大量勞動和專業知識。<lb/>本研究提出了一個基於深度學習的框架，用於自動鑑定Ichneumonoidea蜂類，使用基於YOLO的架構並整合高解析度類別激活映射（HiResCAM）以增強可解釋性。<lb/>所提出的系統同時從高解析度圖像中識別蜂類科。<lb/>數據集包含3556張高解析度的膜翅目標本圖像。<lb/>分類學分布主要集中在Ichneumonidae（n = 786）、Braconidae（n = 648）、Apidae（n = 466）和Vespidae（n = 460）這幾個科。<lb/>使用經過整理的數據集進行了廣泛的實驗，模型性能通過精確度、召回率、F1分數和準確率進行評估。<lb/>結果顯示，準確率超過96%，並且在形態變異中具有強大的泛化能力。<lb/>HiResCAM可視化證實模型專注於分類學相關的解剖區域，如翅脈、觸角分割和後腹結構，從而驗證了學習特徵的生物學合理性。<lb/>可解釋的人工智慧技術的整合提高了透明度和可信度，使該系統適合於昆蟲學研究，以加速對於描述不足的寄生蜂超科的生物多樣性特徵的鑑定。
2603.16351.author: Joao Manoel Herrera Pinheiro et.al.
2603.16351.authors: Joao Manoel Herrera Pinheiro, Gabriela Do Nascimento Herrera, Alvaro Doria Dos Santos, Luciana Bueno Dos Reis Fernandes, Ricardo V. Godoy, Eduardo A. B. Almeida, Helena Carolina Onody, Marcelo Andrade Da Costa Vieira, Angelica Maria Penteado-Dias, Marcelo Becker
